scripts.dev:full: sh -c 'node --watch --use-env-proxy --env-file-if-exists=.env.local server/shotai-api.mjs & api=$!; trap "kill $api 2>/dev/null" EXIT INT TERM; vite --host 127.0.0.1'
scripts.dev:api:clash: HTTPS_PROXY=http://127.0.0.1:7897 HTTP_PROXY=http://127.0.0.1:7897 NO_PROXY=127.0.0.1,localhost npm run dev:api
scripts.dev:full:clash: HTTPS_PROXY=http://127.0.0.1:7897 HTTP_PROXY=http://127.0.0.1:7897 NO_PROXY=127.0.0.1,localhost npm run dev:full
scripts.verify: npm run lint && npm run test && npm run build && node --check server/shotai-api.mjs
